positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a mountain range forming a backdrop for a cosmic nebula, rendered in thick, clean linework and negative space. The mountains are stylized in deep indigo and teal, suggesting crystalline forms. The nebula is depicted with bioluminescent splatter patterns and glowing celestial bodies, utilizing high contrast accents of electric purple and vibrant cyan. Include stylized silhouettes of friendly, mythical creatures (like mountain llamas and small winged beasts) interacting with the cosmic elements. Focus on a central, symmetrical composition ideal for repeating patterns or singular high-impact placement. Vector art style, sticker aesthetic, minimalist complexity, high saturation, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
